system.description: If this hand-axe hits a living target when thrown, it inflicts an additional 3d6 damage. If this results in the death of the target, the Bloody Axe is destroyed. If the Bloody Axe misses, it is not destroyed, but does not automatically return to its target. Roll 1d6: 1-4, it falls on the ground; 5-6, it is lodged in a rock or chunk of wood—a STR 10+ roll is required to retrieve it.
